Oasis Agent (Home).sync_rule: Project overview, key stats (version, test count, adapter/handler counts), links to repo. Keep high-level.

Roadmap.sync_rule: Phase 3 milestone table with status. 'What Shipped Recently' section updated after each milestone. Append, don't rewrite.

Architecture Decisions.sync_rule: Key architectural decisions with rationale. Links to ARCHITECTURE.md for implementation details. Add new decisions as toggles.

Integration Catalog.sync_rule: All adapters, handlers, scanners, notification channels with status. Update counts and tables when new integrations ship.

Backlog.sync_rule: Open issues table and PR review nits. Sync from GitHub issues and memory/project_backlog.md.
